text.title: Fine-tuning with LoRA (PEFT + TRL) Failure Modes

antipattern.symptom: Team picks rank=4 to save VRAM.
antipattern.fix: Move to rank=16; measure VRAM impact (typically <1GB delta).

antipattern.symptom: Adapter merged into base model at save time.
antipattern.fix: Keep modular; merge only at deploy when latency budget demands.
Add eval-step callback; promote best-eval checkpoint.
